description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a white and gray exterior, surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring several trees and shrubs. The house has large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. There is a swimming pool in the backyard, adjacent to a wooden deck with outdoor seating and lounge areas. The property is enclosed by a combination of wooden fencing and hedges, offering privacy and a sense of enclosure. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible from the open roof design, and a driveway leading to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white and gray walls, large windows, a backyard pool, and landscaped surroundings enclosed by fencing and hedges.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above and slightly to the front, highlighting the open roof layout, interior rooms, and the landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, emphasizing the white exterior walls, the pool area, and the privacy provided by trees and hedges along the property line.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the backyard with the pool, wooden deck, and outdoor seating, as well as the rear facade with large windows and sliding doors.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite side, focusing on the wooden fence, additional green space, and the arrangement of rooms visible from the open roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, flush with the facade, and a paved path leading from the driveway, with minimal overhang and no porch.
